h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.recoheredEarlier: I still want to read it like a mini sentence
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will confidently apply the positional rules to submit the task.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: The mini-sentence reading stops at the table: header names the field; row holds the value.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor explicitly addresses the learner's stated cognitive habit by defining its boundary and providing a concrete rule.
scored.tutorAdaptationEvidence: `March`: do not read the word first. Check its place.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: The tutor adapts to the learner's specific fear of marking by word by issuing a direct negative command against reading the word first.

tutor_strategy_reversal.evidence: The mini-sentence reading stops at the table: header names the field; row holds the value.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor explicitly addresses the learner's stated cognitive habit by defining its boundary and providing a concrete rule.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: So the card names the thing acting on the cart first, not the motion.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner is expected to place the cards according to the tutor's instructions without deviation.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Both cards reach the same contact. If this surface is the table, leave one contact label on the cart.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor adapts to the learner's confusion by physically demonstrating the overlap of the surface and table cards and providing a clear rule for resolution.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no subsequent tutor uptake to evaluate.
